user_story: As a Manager, I want to view the hierarchy by manager, so that I can see the reporting structure under a chosen manager
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Hierarchy Chart screen; When I select View by Manager and choose a reporting manager; Then the chart is built from that manager down

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the hierarchy by employee, so that I can trace an individual's reporting line
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Hierarchy Chart screen; When I select View by Employee and choose an employee; Then the chart is centered on that employee

user_story: As a Manager, I want to choose a view such as direct reports, so that I can scope how much of the hierarchy is shown
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Hierarchy Chart screen; When I set the View to Direct reports; Then only the direct reports are included

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select a view type such as Chart Model, so that the hierarchy renders in my preferred format
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Hierarchy Chart screen; When I select a View type; Then the chart is displayed in that format

user_story: As a Manager, I want to generate the hierarchy chart, so that I can visualize the selected structure
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the view, employee/manager and view type; When I click Generate; Then the hierarchy chart is produced

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset my selections, so that I can generate a different chart
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made selections on the Hierarchy Chart screen; When I click Reset; Then all inputs return to defaults
